pi_items.source: Confirmed via setup_task.sh python generation script where 12 specific tracks are marked True to be selected.
Confirmed via explicit check in verifier.py logic for 'Cyber-Neon' in the title tag and task description instructions.
Confirmed via explicit check in verifier.py logic for 'Neon Syndicate' in the creator tag and task description instructions.
Confirmed via explicit checks in export_result.sh which verify the directory structure.
Confirmed via explicit TRACKS_DIR path checked in export_result.sh.
Confirmed via explicit XSPF_PATH checked in export_result.sh.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically generated tracks initialized by setup_task.sh. It expects exactly 12 specific MP3 tracks to be copied to the /home/ga/Desktop/OST_Distribution/tracks directory without symlinks. An XSPF playlist must be generated at /home/ga/Desktop/OST_Distribution/soundtrack.xspf with the title 'Cyber-Neon: Original Soundtrack' and creator 'Neon Syndicate Games'. The verifier logic strictly enforces that the XSPF file must use relative paths instead of absolute file URLs, and the track titles within the XSPF must match the clean ID3 tag titles rather than the raw filenames.
